message: 🌱 Add external-secrets: PushSecrets should implement the same templating options as mission (#666)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "external-secrets-2166-pushsecrets-should-implement-the-same-templating-options-a",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "external-secrets: PushSecrets should implement the same templating options as ExternalSecrets",
+    "description": "PushSecrets should implement the same templating options as ExternalSecrets. Requested by 14+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current external-secrets deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your external-secrets version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nhelm list -n external-secrets 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working external-secrets installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review external-secrets configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant external-secrets configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nkubectl get configmap -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=external-secrets\n```\nWe want to be able to push non-JSON secrets into HashiCorp vault."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for PushSecrets should implement the same templating options as",
+        "description": "## Problem Statement\n\nIt is not currently possible to use a PushSecret to push a whole Secret resource to a secret store. Since the `secretKey` field is mandatory, only a subset of the secret can be pushed.\nRelated to #2166\nThis MR introduce the possibility to not provide a `secretKey`, in this\n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: Secret\nmetadata:\n  name: source-secret\n  namespace: default\nstringData:\n  source-key: \"this is a secret\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets\nkubectl get events -n external-secrets --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"PushSecrets should implement the same templating options as\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Problem Statement\n\nIt is not currently possible to use a PushSecret to push a whole Secret resource to a secret store. Since the `secretKey` field is mandatory, only a subset of the secret can be pushed.\nRelated to #2166\nThis MR introduce the possibility to not provide a `secretKey`, in this case the Secret resource's data field is converted to a JSON string and pushed to the secret store.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: Secret\nmetadata:\n  name: source-secret\n  namespace: default\nstringData:\n  source-key: \"this is a secret\"",
+        "apiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1alpha1\nkind: PushSecret\nmetadata:\n  name: pushsecret-example\n  namespace: default\nspec:\n  refreshInterval: 10s\n  secretStoreRefs:\n    - name: vault-secretstore\n      kind: SecretStore\n  selector:\n    secret:\n      name: source-secret # Source Kubernetes secret to be pushed\n  data:\n    - secretKey: key1\n    - secretKey: key2\n  remoteRef: vault/secret\n  template:\n    engineVersion: v2\n    data:\n      token: {{ key1.token }}\n      color: {{ key2.color | replace \"red\" \"blue\" }}",
+        "apiVersion: external-secrets.io/v1alpha1\nkind: PushSecret\nmetadata:\n  name: pushsecret-example\nspec:\n  # ...\n  template:\n    # how can we support nested data structures?\n    # how do we handle serialization?\n    data:\n      token: {{ key1.token }}\n      color: {{ key2.color | replace \"red\" \"blue\" }}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "external-secrets",
+      "sandbox",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "external-secrets"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace",
+      "Secret"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/issues/2166",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/pull/2288"
+    },
+    "reactions": 14,
+    "comments": 13,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with external-secrets installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:32:42.996Z",

+}
